form_fields.min_clearances: Multiple MIN ground clearance measurements (side view and front view)

specifications.title: Third Wheel Mower Data Sheet
specifications.welding_specs: AWS specifications to E-70xx electrodes or E-70T1 Code 5.3 flux core wire only

features: Dimensional data form for three-wheeled mower vehicles
Side view, front view, and rear view diagrams with measurement callouts
Captures tire diameter, vehicle weight, and minimum ground clearances
notes: All dimensions to be entered in inches
Please be complete in entering dimensional data
Determination in suiting lifting requirements is only as accurate and complete as the data received
Note any areas that may cause problems in vehicle lifting
